note: Canonical mirror of the W887 production wrapper benchmark for X04 claim verification. Source-of-truth file is benchmarks/wave887-wrapper-prod-2026-05-26.json at the repo root; this checked-in copy lives in public/benchmarks/ so the X04 verifier walks the same rows[] shape it uses for sota-quantize-matrix. Numbers below are the exact mean/p50/p95 from the 10-call live run against https://kolm.ai with model=claude-haiku-4-5.
prompt: In two short sentences, explain what an LLM gateway does.

rows.label: Kolm gateway to anthropic (via Vercel proxy fallback)
Kolm gateway to local trinity-500 (projected from W869)
rows.note: projected from W869 trinity-500 benchmark (n=57, mean 1.24s / 210 chars, $0 upstream)

wrapper_tax_decomposition.note: Pipeline phase = PII scan + chain resolve + Ed25519 sign + capture write. Vercel hop = Railway gateway proxying to /v1/teacher/chat which holds the provider key.

verification_steps: Each leg ran 10 paired identical prompts in a single session.
Gateway-side: receipt IDs captured from response envelope; upstream 2xx counted from leg metadata.
Cost computed from public provider token rates (Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5: $0.80/$4.00 per million in/out).
